name: Somya Kothari
tagline: AI & ML Engineering Student · Software Developer · Building Intelligent Solutions
bio: I'm Somya Kothari, a 2nd-year B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science Engineering with a focus on AI & ML at Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research, Indore.
My goal is to strengthen my AI/ML and software engineering skills through real-world projects and become an AI Engineer building intelligent, scalable systems.
I believe in building systems that learn from data, solve real-world problems, and create meaningful impact.
college: Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research
